activity_summary: A support operations manager reviews refund escalation cases and decides approve, policy review, or missing evidence.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: A static model-driven refund escalation console for case R-1842 that combines manager decisioning with raw implementation diagnostics requested by the brief.
parsed.css: :root{color-scheme:light;--bg:#f4f6f8;--surface:#ffffff;--surface-soft:#f8fafc;--line:#d9e2ec;--text:#1f2937;--muted:#667085;--blue:#1d4ed8;--blue-soft:#e8f0ff;--green:#067647;--green-soft:#e7f7ef;--amber:#b54708;--amber-soft:#fff3df;--red:#b42318;--red-soft:#fff1f0;--teal:#0f766e;--teal-soft:#e6f5f3}*{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif}.app-shell{min-height:100vh;padding:16px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:260px minmax(540px,1fr) 330px;grid-template-rows:auto 1fr;gap:16px}.topbar{grid-column:1/-1;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:14px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px}.eyebrow{margin:0 0 4px;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}h1,h2,h3,p{margin-top:0}h1{margin-bottom:0;font-size:24px;line-height:1.2}h2{font-size:16px;margin-bottom:12px}h3{font-size:14px;margin-bottom:8px}.top-actions,.button-row,.crud-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}.panel{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;min-width:0}.queue-panel,.diagnostics-panel{padding:12px;overflow:auto}.review-panel{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;overflow:auto}.section{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:14px}.queue-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}.queue-item{width:100%;text-align:left;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--surface-soft);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;display:grid;gap:4px;color:var(--text)}.queue-item.active{border-color:var(--blue);background:var(--blue-soft);box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 var(--blue)}.queue-meta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)}.case-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start}.case-title{font-size:20px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}.muted{color:var(--muted)}.mono{font-family:Menlo,Consolas,monospace;font-size:12px}.chip,.system-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--surface-soft);border-radius:999px;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap}.chip.warn{background:var(--amber-soft);color:var(--amber);border-color:#f4c07a}.chip.good,.system-pill.good{background:var(--green-soft);color:var(--green);border-color:#a9dfbf}.chip.bad{background:var(--red-soft);color:var(--red);border-color:#f4b8b0}.field-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:10px;margin-top:12px}.field{background:var(--surface-soft);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;min-height:70px}.field span{display:block;color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px}.field strong{font-size:14px}.policy-box{border:1px solid #b7d7d2;background:var(--teal-soft);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;color:#134e4a}.evidence-list,.tool-list,.error-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}.evidence-item,.tool-item,.error-item{display:grid;grid-template-columns:22px 1fr;gap:8px;align-items:start;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;background:var(--surface-soft);padding:10px}.mark{width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:800}.mark.ok{background:var(--green-soft);color:var(--green)}.mark.missing{background:var(--amber-soft);color:var(--amber)}.decision-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:10px}.action-card{border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--surface-soft);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;text-align:left;min-height:110px;color:var(--text)}.action-card strong{display:block;margin-bottom:6px}.action-card.selected{border-color:var(--amber);background:var(--amber-soft);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px var(--amber)}.action-card:disabled{opacity:.55}.handoff{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}.textarea{min-height:90px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;background:#fff;padding:10px;font-size:14px;line-height:1.45}.button{border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}.button.primary{background:var(--blue);border-color:var(--blue);color:white}.button.warn{background:var(--amber);border-color:var(--amber);color:white}.button.danger{background:white;border-color:#f4b8b0;color:var(--red)}.data-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px}.data-table th,.data-table td{border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);padding:7px 4px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top}.data-table th{color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase}.diagnostic-block{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;margin-bottom:12px;background:var(--surface-soft)}.diagnostic-block:last-child{margin-bottom:0}.kv{display:grid;grid-template-columns:105px 1fr;gap:6px;font-size:12px;margin:6px 0}.kv span:first-child{color:var(--muted)}@media(max-width:1100px){.app-shell{grid-template-columns:1fr}.topbar{align-items:flex-start;flex-direction:column}.field-grid,.decision-grid,.handoff{grid-template-columns:1fr}.queue-panel,.diagnostics-panel{overflow:visible}}
parsed.html:
Refund operations

Escalation case review

API endpoint /refund_case: 200 OKPrompt template v4.2

Escalation queue

Selected refund case

R-1842 · Nora Diaz

Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.

Evidence incomplete
CustomerNora Diaz
PlanPro annual
Amount$184.20
Current stateNeeds receipt

Policy and evidence

Policy fit: Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review.
✓
Renewal date confirmed

Purchase history supports the renewal date.

✓
Customer reason captured

Support note includes the refund reason from the customer.

!
Receipt photo missing

Receipt photo is required before manager approval.

Decision

Handoff

Next action

Return to support agent. Ask for receipt photo before manager approval can continue.

Reason for decision

Evidence is incomplete: purchase history and support reason are present, but the receipt photo is missing. Approval remains blocked; policy review is not required yet.

refund_case database fields

FieldValue
idR-1842
customerNora Diaz
planPro annual
amount$184.20
requestSubscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.
statusEvidence incomplete
resource_idrefund_case:R-1842

JSON schema validation

!
evidence.receipt_photo_url

Required field is missing.

✓
policy.window_status

Valid: inside exception window.

Tool call results

✓
purchase_history.lookup

Renewal date confirmed.

✓
policy_window.check

Manager approval allowed when evidence is complete.

!
evidence.scan

Receipt photo not found.

Resource and endpoint

Resource idrefund_case:R-1842
GET status200 OK
PATCH statusPending save
Endpoint/api/refunds/R-1842

CRUD controls
